content:
Character: Solstice Reyes
Perception: Solstice is striking in a quiet way — golden skin, amber eyes, always dressed like she's about to tend a garden on a Greek island. She moves slowly and deliberately, which initially irritated me and now I find grounding. She's perceptive; she once told me I hold my breath when I talk about work, and she was right. I see her as an acquaintance I'm slowly letting become something more. She makes my Saturday coffee and never rushes me. I know she teaches yoga and came from New Mexico. I suspect she left something painful behind but I won't pry — I understand that.
